section.title: DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio Class Reference

listitem.para: static TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DOFade (this AudioSource target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens an AudioSource's volume to the given value.
static TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DOPitch (this AudioSource target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens an AudioSource's pitch to the given value.
static TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DOSetFloat (this AudioMixer target, string floatName, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens an AudioMixer's exposed float to the given value.
static int DOComplete (this AudioMixer target, bool withCallbacks=false)

Completes all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens completed (meaning the tweens that don't have infinite loops and were not already complete)
static int DOKill (this AudioMixer target, bool complete=false)
Kills all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens killed.
static int DOFlip (this AudioMixer target)

Flips the direction (backwards if it was going forward or viceversa) of all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens flipped.
static int DOGoto (this AudioMixer target, float to, bool andPlay=false)

Sends to the given position all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens involved.
static int DOPause (this AudioMixer target)
Pauses all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens paused.
static int DOPlay (this AudioMixer target)
Plays all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens played.
static int DOPlayBackwards (this AudioMixer target)

Plays backwards all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens played.
static int DOPlayForward (this AudioMixer target)

Plays forward all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens played.
static int DORestart (this AudioMixer target)
Restarts all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens restarted.
static int DORewind (this AudioMixer target)
Rewinds all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens rewinded.
static int DOSmoothRewind (this AudioMixer target)

Smoothly rewinds all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens rewinded.
static int DOTogglePause (this AudioMixer target)

Toggles the paused state (plays if it was paused, pauses if it was playing) of all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens involved.

section.section:
Member Function Documentation
DOComplete() DOCompleteDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOComplete
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOComplete (this AudioMixer target, bool withCallbacks = false )[static]
Completes all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens completed (meaning the tweens that don't have infinite loops and were not already complete)
Parameters
withCallbacks
For Sequences only: if TRUE also internal Sequence callbacks will be fired, otherwise they will be ignored
DOFade() DOFadeDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOFade
TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOFade (this AudioSource target, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens an AudioSource's volume to the given value.
Also stores the AudioSource as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach (0 to 1)
duration
The duration of the tween
DOFlip() DOFlipDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOFlip
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOFlip (this AudioMixer target)[static]
Flips the direction (backwards if it was going forward or viceversa) of all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens flipped.
DOGoto() DOGotoDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOGoto
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOGoto (this AudioMixer target, float to, bool andPlay = false )[static]
Sends to the given position all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens involved.
Parameters
to
Time position to reach (if higher than the whole tween duration the tween will simply reach its end)
andPlay
If TRUE will play the tween after reaching the given position, otherwise it will pause it
DOKill() DOKillDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOKill
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOKill (this AudioMixer target, bool complete = false )[static]
Kills all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens killed.
Parameters
complete
If TRUE completes the tween before killing it
DOPause() DOPauseDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOPause
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOPause (this AudioMixer target)[static]
Pauses all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens paused.
DOPitch() DOPitchDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOPitch
TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOPitch (this AudioSource target, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens an AudioSource's pitch to the given value.
Also stores the AudioSource as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOPlay() DOPlayDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOPlay
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOPlay (this AudioMixer target)[static]
Plays all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens played.
DOPlayBackwards() DOPlayBackwardsDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOPlayBackwards
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOPlayBackwards (this AudioMixer target)[static]
Plays backwards all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens played.
DOPlayForward() DOPlayForwardDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOPlayForward
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOPlayForward (this AudioMixer target)[static]
Plays forward all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens played.
DORestart() DORestartDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDORestart
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DORestart (this AudioMixer target)[static]
Restarts all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens restarted.
DORewind() DORewindDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDORewind
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DORewind (this AudioMixer target)[static]
Rewinds all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens rewinded.
DOSetFloat() DOSetFloatDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOSetFloat
TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOSetFloat (this AudioMixer target, string floatName, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens an AudioMixer's exposed float to the given value.
Also stores the AudioMixer as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations. Note that you need to manually expose a float in an AudioMixerGroup in order to be able to tween it from an AudioMixer.
Parameters
floatName
Name given to the exposed float to set
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOSmoothRewind() DOSmoothRewindDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOSmoothRewind
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOSmoothRewind (this AudioMixer target)[static]
Smoothly rewinds all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens rewinded.
DOTogglePause() DOTogglePauseDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudioDOTogglePause
int DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleAudio.DOTogglePause (this AudioMixer target)[static]
Toggles the paused state (plays if it was paused, pauses if it was playing) of all tweens that have this target as a reference (meaning tweens that were started from this target, or that had this target added as an Id) and returns the total number of tweens involved.
The documentation for this class was generated from the following file: C:/Users/camil/OneDrive/Documents/GitHub/VGDC-Game-2025-26/Assets/Plugins/Demigiant/DOTween/Modules/DOTweenModuleAudio.cs
